enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the Checkmarx vulnerability analyzer should be enabled.

aliasSyncEnabled.title: Alias Synchronization Enabled
aliasSyncEnabled.description: Whether to include alias information in vulnerability data.

authApiBaseUrl.title: Authentication API Base URL
authApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of Checkmarx's authentication API.

apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of Checkmarx's REST API.

orgId.title: Organization ID
orgId.description: Organization ID to authenticate with the Checkmarx REST API.

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Refresh token (API Key) to authenticate with the Checkmarx REST API.
